claim: borderline single-invariant signal on full 50: log_abs_Delta_3 with delta = A_fit - 6 has Spearman rho=-0.451, raw p=0.00102, Bonferroni-corrected p=0.0112 (m=11) -- passes |rho|>0.4 and Bonferroni p<0.05 but narrowly misses Bonferroni p<0.01 strict cut

with the noisy outlier family 31 (stderr 0.074) excluded, log_abs_Delta_3 passes the strict cut: Spearman rho=-0.492, raw p=0.000334, Bonferroni-corrected p=0.00367, BH q=0.00367 (m=11); family 31 MASKS rather than drives the signal
A_stderr-weighted Spearman peak |rho|=0.581 vs unweighted peak |rho|=0.451; ratio=1.29 (does/does not exceed factor 2 -- see flags.weighting_divergence)
family-31-excluded Spearman peak |rho|=0.492 vs full-50 peak |rho|=0.451; signal (or null) persists without family 31
best 2-invariant rank regression: (log_abs_Delta_3, CM_disc) with adjusted R^2=0.218, raw R^2=0.249 (descriptive only)
